sections.title: Overview
sections.content: 码镜 is a macOS dynamic wallpaper app supporting Scene2D and video bundles. This is sample copy—full guides will be added here.

sections.title: Install & updates
sections.content: Get 码镜 from the Mac App Store. Update and compatibility notes will expand in this section. (Placeholder)

sections.title: Wallpaper Hub
sections.content: Browse curated and community picks in Wallpaper Hub; import and management steps will follow. (Placeholder)

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: 码镜工坊 edits scenes, previews, and exports .bundle wallpaper packs. Sample text—detailed tutorials coming later.

sections.title: Export bundles
sections.content: Use export to produce a .bundle for 码镜 with metadata for sharing. (Placeholder)

sections.title: Use with 码镜
sections.content: Import bundles into the 码镜 app; contact support by email if you hit compatibility issues. (Placeholder)

sections.title: Scope
sections.content: This policy covers bundles shown, submitted, or used with 码镜. Sample framework—final legal text will be published separately.

sections.title: Rights & materials
sections.content: Submitters warrant they have rights to the content and will cooperate on attribution and takedown requests. (Placeholder)

sections.title: Submission & display
sections.content: Accepted work may appear in Wallpaper Hub; presentation details are agreed case by case. (Placeholder)
